'''mokanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kvlt|kvlt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kvlt|kvlt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mokanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mokanithi|mokanithi]] || [[word:mokaniji|mokaniji]] || [[word:mokanishi|mokanishi]] || [[word:mokaniki|mokaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mokanuthuthu|mokanuthuthu]] || [[word:mokanujuju|mokanujuju]] || [[word:mokanushushu|mokanushushu]] || [[word:mokanukuku|mokanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mokanuthu|mokanuthu]] || [[word:mokanuju|mokanuju]] || [[word:mokanushu|mokanushu]] || [[word:mokanuku|mokanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mokanufthuf|mokanufthuf]] || [[word:mokanufjuf|mokanufjuf]] || [[word:mokanufshuf|mokanufshuf]] || [[word:mokanufkuf|mokanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mokanethe|mokanethe]] || [[word:mokaneje|mokaneje]] || [[word:mokaneshe|mokaneshe]] || [[word:mokaneke|mokaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mokanothotho|mokanothotho]] || [[word:mokanojojo|mokanojojo]] || [[word:mokanoshosho|mokanoshosho]] || [[word:mokanokoko|mokanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mokanotho|mokanotho]] || [[word:mokanojo|mokanojo]] || [[word:mokanosho|mokanosho]] || [[word:mokanoko|mokanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mokanofthof|mokanofthof]] || [[word:mokanofjof|mokanofjof]] || [[word:mokanofshof|mokanofshof]] || [[word:mokanofkof|mokanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfthĂŻf|mokanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfjĂŻf|mokanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfshĂŻf|mokanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfkĂŻf|mokanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mokanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mokanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mokanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mokanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfthĂŻf|mokanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfjĂŻf|mokanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfshĂŻf|mokanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfkĂŻf|mokanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfthĂŻf|mokanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfjĂŻf|mokanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfshĂŻf|mokanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mokanĂŻfkĂŻf|mokanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mokanĂŠthĂŠ|mokanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mokanĂŠjĂŠ|mokanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mokanĂŠshĂŠ|mokanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mokanĂŠkĂŠ|mokanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mokanathatha|mokanathatha]] || [[word:mokanajaja|mokanajaja]] || [[word:mokanashasha|mokanashasha]] || [[word:mokanakaka|mokanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mokanatha|mokanatha]] || [[word:mokanaja|mokanaja]] || [[word:mokanasha|mokanasha]] || [[word:mokanaka|mokanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mokanafthaf|mokanafthaf]] || [[word:mokanafjaf|mokanafjaf]] || [[word:mokanafshaf|mokanafshaf]] || [[word:mokanafkaf|mokanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mokanasha|mokanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mokanshĂ«asha|mokanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mokanroasha|mokanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mokanmuasha|mokanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mokanyaasha|mokanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomokannkshĂ«asha|gomokannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomokannkroasha|gomokannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomokannkmuasha|gomokannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomokannkyaasha|gomokannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mokakanasha|mokakanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mokakanshĂ«asha|mokakanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mokakanroasha|mokakanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mokakanmuasha|mokakanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mokakanyaasha|mokakanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomokakannkshĂ«asha|gomokakannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomokakannkroasha|gomokakannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomokakannkmuasha|gomokakannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomokakannkyaasha|gomokakannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mekĂŠnasha|mekĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mekĂŠnshĂ«asha|mekĂŠnshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mekĂŠnroasha|mekĂŠnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mekĂŠnmuasha|mekĂŠnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mekĂŠnyaasha|mekĂŠnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomekĂŠnnkshĂ«asha|gomekĂŠnnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomekĂŠnnkroasha|gomekĂŠnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomekĂŠnnkmuasha|gomekĂŠnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomekĂŠnnkyaasha|gomekĂŠnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mokfanasha|mokfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mokfanshĂ«asha|mokfanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mokfanroasha|mokfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mokfanmuasha|mokfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mokfanyaasha|mokfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomokfannkshĂ«asha|gomokfannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomokfannkroasha|gomokfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomokfannkmuasha|gomokfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomokfannkyaasha|gomokfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
